params.value: SELECT plLossReason__c, COUNT(Id) FROM Opportunity WHERE Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' AND StageName = 'Closed Lost' AND CloseDate >= 2025-01-01 GROUP BY plLossReason__c ORDER BY COUNT(Id) DESC LIMIT 20
